+82-02-123-0000, 17-3 Haneul-ro, Seongwon-gu, Haneul City, Boram-do 09999, Republic of Korea.
We process personal data of employees, contractors, and investor-relations (IR) contacts for HR management, deal execution, and exchange disclosure obligations consistent with the Capital Markets Act (FSCMA) on material nonpublic information.
Identifiable fields may include name, resident-number for identity verification, employment details, payroll data, and insider-list roles relating to important information not yet publicly disclosed.
Example anchor: Mr. Dae-hoon Lim (Employee No. E-0419) — resident-number: 79XX01-2XXXXXX, biometric face template for gate access, and a recent occupational health report indicating hypertension; he is recorded as a dues-paying member of the Orion Fab Workers Union solely for payroll deduction and compliance.
Example anchor: Ms. Ara Jeong (IR officer) — maintains draft earnings call scripts and an acquisition term sheet for Greenpeak Robotics Co. that constitute important information not yet publicly disclosed under FSCMA.
We do not collect genetic data, except where an employee voluntarily submits a medical certificate; however, our engineers may reference genetic algorithms in software documentation.
Access to MNPI is strictly need-to-know; IR drafts, insider lists, and deal rooms are restricted until filings are made public on the Haneul Stock Exchange (HSE) portal and via press release.
Transfers: certain processing is performed by CloudSong Data Services Pte. in the Nasan Republic and by Hanstream Cloud KR for backup, under contractual safeguards and breach notification to the competent securities authority if required.
Retention: insider lists and pre-deal communications are retained 5 years after public disclosure; employee health surveillance records are retained 3 years under workplace safety guidance; biometric templates are deleted within 30 days of separation.
Data subject rights (PIPA): you may request access, correction, deletion, or suspension via privacy@mokdan-semi.example.kr or DPO Ms. So

contacts for HR management, deal execution, and exchange disclosure obligations consistent with the Capital Markets Act (FSCMA) on material nonpublic information.

Example anchor: Ms. Ara Jeong (IR officer) — maintains draft earnings call scripts and an acquisition term sheet for Greenpeak Robotics Co. that constitute important information not yet publicly disclosed under FSCMA.
We do not collect genetic data, except where an employee voluntarily submits a medical certificate; however, our engineers may reference genetic algorithms in software documentation.
Access to MNPI is strictly need-to-know; IR drafts, insider lists, and deal rooms are restricted until filings are made public on the Haneul Stock Exchange (HSE) portal and via press release.
Transfers: certain processing is performed by CloudSong Data Services Pte. in the Nasan Republic and by Hanstream Cloud KR for backup, under contractual safeguards and breach notification to the competent securities authority if required.
Retention: insider lists and pre-deal communications are retained 5 years after public disclosure; employee health surveillance records are retained 3 years under workplace safety guidance; biometric templates are deleted within 30 days of separation.
Data subject rights (PIPA): you may request access, correction, deletion, or suspension via privacy@mokdan-semi.example.kr or DPO Ms. So-yeon Park at dpo@mokdan-semi.example.kr; we respond within 10 business days.
We may need to verify identity with a masked resident-number and a one-time code; an unreasonable or manifestly unfounded request may be refused with written reasons.
This notice also applies to investors who sign up for Aurora Pay dividend payouts and SoriWatch alerts, but does not apply to fan clubs or the Haneul Thunder sports schedule.
Our Open Horizon Inclusion Policy uses plain language about sexual orientation and religion as general DEI topics without recording such attributes unless you expressly provide them for accommodations.
